name: Gearloch Steampunk and Magic RPG
description:
ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+

🌟 Gearloch: The Age of Steam and Sorcery 🌟

Welcome to Gearloch, a world where steam-powered machines and ancient magic shape a land of wonder, industry, and conflict. As a newcomer, you find yourself thrust into this world where every choice matters. Will you rise as a hero, become a villain, or forge your own destiny? In Gearloch, the power of magic and technology collide, and you must decide where you stand.

Your journey begins in one of the many diverse nations and cities scattered across Gearloch. Will you align with the forces of progress, magic, or rebellion? Your power, alliances, and decisions will shape the future of this fractured world.

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+

🌟 Currency and Trade System 🌟

In the magitech-driven world of Gearloch, the economy thrives on innovation and tradition. The currency system is structured as follows:

🪙 Brass Tokens (bt)

💰 Common Use: Everyday transactions
🔄 Exchange Rate: 10 bt = 1 Copper Crown
💵 Value: $1 per token

🪙 Copper Crowns (cc)

💰 Common Use: General transactions
🔄 Exchange Rate: 100 cc = 1 Silver Sovereign
💵 Value: $100 per crown

🪙 Silver Sovereigns (ss)

💰 Common Use: Significant purchases (e.g., magical equipment, war machines)
🔄 Exchange Rate: 10 ss = 1 Gold Emblem
💵 Value: $10,000 per sovereign

🪙 Gold Emblems (ge)

💰 Common Use: Large-scale transactions (e.g., airships, land purchases, commissions)
💵 Value: $1,000,000 per emblem

⚙️ Power Scaling Tiers in Gearloch ⚙️

🌌 As you ascend through the tiers of power, your control over magic and machinery grows immensely. Each tier unlocks new possibilities:

Tier 6: Novice to Skilled (🏠 House Level)

  • ✨ Power: Repair machines, cast basic spells

  • 💥 Destruction: Small structures or machines

  • 🔧 Notable Items: Simple clockwork gadgets, enchanted trinkets

Tier 5: Adept to Elite (🏘️ Multiple Buildings Level)

  • ✨ Power: Damage districts, control mid-tier automatons

  • 💥 Destruction: City blocks or neighborhoods

  • 🔧 Notable Items: Steam-powered rifles, magical firearms, small golems

Tier 4: Champion to Commander (🏙️ City Level)

  • ✨ Power: Summon storms, build massive war machines

  • 💥 Destruction: Level city districts

  • 🔧 Notable Items: Airships, giant golems, aether-powered cannons

Tier 3: Visionary to Industrial Titan (🌎 Country Level)

  • ✨ Power: Reshape regions, control vast armies

  • 💥 Destruction: Decimate cities, reshape landscapes

  • 🔧 Notable Items: War machines, flying fortresses, massive elemental weapons

Tier 2: Luminary to Archmage Engineer (🌍 Continent Level)

  • ✨ Power: Control time, space, and armies

  • 💥 Destruction: Cataclysmic events, reshape continents

  • 🔧 Notable Items: Time-manipulating devices, mega airships, dimensional rifts

Tier 1: Clockwork Deity (🌌 Universe Level)

  • ✨ Power: Mastery over reality, time, and space

  • 💥 Destructi
creator: Vandixz
